title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.

traits: owns a structured coat for crisis scenes
replies to texts while processing betrayal
secret_capacity: buried one traumatic detail under work for years

cast.suspicion_profile: can host Thanksgiving but could move a body-shaped rug

secret_capacity: knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits

beat_sheet.text: Tess Pike relocates to Alder Ridge after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting annex room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Wyatt Mercer hesitates before explaining unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.00.

Evelyn Winterson hates the move and immediately distrusts Tess Pruitt, a local carpenter with sad eyes with suspiciously healthy handyman energy and access to church basement described as seasonal materials. Tess Pruitt hesitates before explaining church basement described as seasonal materials. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.07. The sheriff sees fresh mud on the boat key.

contradiction_ledger.entry: Tess Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
Tess Pike says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

dialogue_samples: "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Tess?"
"Mothers do not disappear, Evelyn. They evaporate into paperwork."
"I checked his social media likes, Tess. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
"The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
"Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Gavin."
"You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
"If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
"I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
fake_critic_blurb: "Her Silent Christmas Alibi understands that menace is a regional utility." - County Suspense Quarterly
sequel_hook: Channel 8 Night Report hints that the vineyard fire had a witness who still hosts brunch.
synopsis: Inspired by true events in the emotional sense only, "Her Silent Christmas Alibi" follows Tess Pike, an overextended professional woman who mistakes productivity for safety until suspiciously healthy handyman friendship collides with Tess Pruitt, a comforting regional adult carrying portable suspicion and plausible access to offsite storage. As a child drawing stairs, Blackthorn County reveals once again that every secret comes home and every adult has somewhere emotionally alarming to stand in silence. Where every secret comes home.
